_comment: Optional per-agent model overrides for the dev-workflow feature loop. Copy to .dev-workflow/models.json and edit. Any agent you OMIT keeps the default baked into its agents/*.md frontmatter. Values accept aliases (opus, sonnet, haiku, fable) or full model IDs (claude-opus-4-8, claude-sonnet-5, ...), plus 'inherit' (use the session's main model). Keys starting with _ are ignored.
